description: Convert the raw attendee list in /home/ga/Documents/attendee_export_raw.docx into a professional check-in sheet. The document should be in landscape orientation with the tab-separated text converted into a table. Format the header row to be bold with a light gray background. Sort the table data alphabetically by Company (Column 3) as the primary key and Last Name (Column 1) as the secondary key. Save the finalized document as /home/ga/Documents/check_in_sheet.docx.
